description_long: This is a futuristic, compact handgun with a robust, angular frame and a predominantly metallic gray finish accented by orange highlights and markings. The body features a combination of smooth and textured surfaces, with visible mechanical details such as screws, rails, and vent-like structures. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a dark, matte finish and subtle geometric patterns for enhanced handling. The upper slide is adorned with engraved lines and a prominent power symbol, while the lower section houses a boxy magazine with a reinforced base. Several orange decals and warning symbols are distributed across the frame, adding to its high-tech, industrial appearance. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for advanced urban combat scenarios, blending both functionality and visual intimidation.
description: A compact, futuristic handgun with a metallic gray body, orange accents, and detailed mechanical features. Its ergonomic grip and high-tech markings give it a robust, industrial look.
description_view_0: The left side view reveals the full profile, showing the angular frame, orange decals, and detailed grip with visible screws and mechanical components.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the barrel opening, upper rail, and the symmetry of the slide, with the power symbol and sight alignment visible.
description_view_2: The right side view displays additional orange markings, the boxy magazine, and the intricate mechanical details on the frame and grip.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the slide and grip, showing the rear sight and the layered construction of the handgun's body.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and ergonomically contoured, featuring a dark, matte finish with subtle geometric texturing for improved handling. It has a slightly angular profile with integrated finger grooves and a reinforced base, providing both comfort and control. The surface appears to be made of a durable polymer or rubberized material, and there are visible mechanical details such as screws and panel lines. No prominent logos are visible, but the design is visually cohesive with the rest of the handgun's industrial aesthetic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and angular, with a squared-off front edge and a slight undercut for improved finger placement. It is integrated seamlessly into the lower frame, providing structural reinforcement and a modern, tactical appearance. The surface is smooth with no visible texturing, and the overall design prioritizes both protection and accessibility for the trigger.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and robust, with a squared profile and a prominent muzzle opening. It appears to be integrated into the slide, with no visible threading or compensator features. The exterior is finished in metallic gray, matching the rest of the handgun, and there are no visible flutes or porting. The design suggests a focus on durability and compactness.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved lines and a prominent power symbol near the rear, along with several orange decals and warning symbols distributed along the upper and lower sections. There are no visible manufacturer logos or serial numbers, but the markings are bold and contribute to the high-tech, industrial look of the weapon.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is boxy and reinforced, with a flat bottom and slightly beveled edges for easy insertion and removal. It is finished in a matching metallic gray with subtle panel lines and no visible finger rests or logos. The design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and ease of handling.
